items.summary: Update the backend admin authentication logic so that the hardcoded admin account uses the email 'admin@mathtutor.com' and password 'Admin@123'. The login check must match against these exact credentials and return a valid admin session/token on success.

Update the frontend Login page so that when the admin login form is submitted with email 'admin@mathtutor.com' and password 'Admin@123', it correctly authenticates against the backend (and/or localStorage fallback) using these exact credentials, stores the admin session, and redirects to the admin dashboard without showing 'invalid credentials'.
